heading: Right of Puerto Rico to determine its future political status
label: 2192 Right of Puerto Rico to determine its future political status
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be interpreted to restrict Puerto Rico’s right to determine its future political status, including by conducting the plebiscite as authorized by .Public Law 113–76
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Puerto Rico Oversight, Management, and Economic Stability Act and also as PROMESA, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 114–187130 Stat. 549section 2101 of this titleJune 30, 2016, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2014. Provisions relating to appropriations for a plebiscite on Puerto Rico’s future political status appear at . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Public Law 113–76Pub.
